slides.title: Welcome to JVA Internship Board
slides.subtitle: Trial Member Onboarding Guide
slides.catchphrase: Connecting international students with Tokyo startups

left.label: Students
left.description: International students looking for internships at Tokyo startups

right.label: Startups
right.description: English-friendly companies seeking motivated international talent

items.title: Student Community
items.description: Manage the LINE community. Answer questions daily, send weekly job broadcast posts, keep students engaged.

items.title: Application Management
items.description: Process applications within 48h. Check eligibility, record in spreadsheet, forward CVs to companies.

items.title: Company Research & Outreach
items.description: Find and approach new startups. Build prospect lists, draft outreach messages, track responses.

items.title: Student Acquisition
items.description: Grow the student community. Identify new channels, propose campaigns, test and iterate.

steps.label: Monitor Response
steps.description: Alert if no reply in 4 days

columns.heading: Communication
bullets: LINE Official Account — Student community & broadcasts

columns.heading: Data & Tracking
bullets: Google Sheets — Student DB, company DB, application tracker

columns.heading: Automation
bullets: GAS (automated) — CV email system (you monitor, system sends)

items.detail: Response time < 24h, weekly post goes out on schedule
All applications processed within 48h, zero missed CVs
5+ companies researched and added to prospect list
At least 1 new channel or tactic proposed and tested

columns.heading: Daily Questions
bullets: Ask Nahi or Sora via LINE
Better to ask early than fix later

columns.heading: Unsure About an Application
bullets: When in doubt, ask the team

columns.heading: Urgent Issues
bullets: Company no reply after 4 days → alert team

slides.contact: Questions? Reach out via LINE or Discord anytime.
